targets.query: SELECT mean("usage_idle") * -1 + 100 FROM "cpu" WHERE "host" =~ /^$server$/ AND "cpu" = 'cpu-total' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s) fill(null)
SELECT mean("used_percent") FROM "mem" WHERE "host" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s) fill(null)
SELECT last("uptime") FROM "system" WHERE "host" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter fill(null)

SELECT mean("usage_guest") AS "Usage Guest", mean("usage_guest_nice") AS "Usage Guest Nice", mean("usage_idle") AS "Usage Idle", mean("usage_iowait") AS "Usage IO Wait", mean("usage_irq") AS "Usage IRQ", mean("usage_nice") AS "Usage Nice", mean("usage_softirq") AS "Usage Soft IRQ", mean("usage_steal") AS "Usage Steal", mean("usage_system") AS "Usage System", mean("usage_user") AS "Usage User" FROM "cpu" WHERE "host" =~ /^$server$/ AND "cpu" = 'cpu-total' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host" fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("reads"), 1s) AS "Reads", non_negative_derivative(mean("writes"), 1s) AS "Writes" FROM "diskio" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host", "name" fill(null)
SELECT non_negative_derivative(last("weighted_io_time"), 1ms) as "iops_in_progress" from "diskio" WHERE   ("host" =~ /^$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host", "name" fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("read_bytes"), 1s) AS "Reads", non_negative_derivative(mean("write_bytes"), 1s) AS "Writes" FROM "diskio" WHERE "host" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host", "name" fill(null)
SELECT mean("inodes_free") AS "inodes free", mean("inodes_used") AS "inotes used" FROM "disk" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host" fill(null)
SELECT derivative(mean("io_time"), 1ms) AS "IO utilisation" FROM "diskio" WHERE "host" =~ /^$server$/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "name", "host" fill(null)

SELECT non_negative_derivative(mean("in"), 10s) AS "in", non_negative_derivative(mean("out"), 10s) AS "out" FROM "swap" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host" fill(null)

SELECT derivative(first(bytes_recv), 1s) * 8 as "in bits/sec", derivative(first(bytes_sent), 1s) * 8 as "out bits/sec" FROM net WHERE host =~ /^$server$/ AND interface =~ /(vlan|eth|bond|vmbr|ens|eno|ixl|gb|enp).*/ AND interface !~ /veth/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host", "interface" fill(null)

SELECT NON_NEGATIVE_DIFFERENCE(mean("packets_recv"))/10 AS "in", NON_NEGATIVE_DIFFERENCE(mean("packets_sent"))/10 AS "out" FROM net WHERE host =~ /^$server$/ AND interface =~ /(vlan|eth|bond|vmbr|ens|eno|ix|gb|enp).*/ AND interface !~ /veth/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host", "interface" fill(null)

SELECT mean("tcp_close") AS "CLOSED", mean("tcp_close_wait") AS "CLOSE_WAIT", mean("tcp_closing") AS "CLOSING", mean("tcp_established") AS "ESTABLISHED", mean("tcp_fin_wait1") AS "FIN_WAIT1", mean("tcp_fin_wait2") AS "FIN_WAIT2", mean("tcp_last_ack") AS "LAST_ACK", mean("tcp_syn_recv") AS "SYN_RECV", mean("tcp_syn_sent") AS "SYN_SENT", mean("tcp_time_wait") AS "TIME_WAIT" FROM "netstat" WHERE ("host" =~ /^$server$/) AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host" fill(null)

SELECT mean("err_in") AS "Errors In", mean("err_out") AS "Errors Out" FROM net WHERE host =~ /^$server$/ AND interface =~ /(vlan|eth|bond|vmbr|ens|eno|ix|gb).*/ AND interface !~ /veth/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host", "interface" fill(null)

SELECT mean("drop_in") AS "Drops In", mean("drop_out") AS "Drops Out" FROM net WHERE host =~ /^$server$/ AND interface =~ /(vlan|eth|bond|vmbr|ens|eno|ix|gb).*/ AND interface !~ /veth/ AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time(10s), "host", "interface" fill(null)
